arts.ttl: Who will Real Madrid face if they advance past Manchester City in the Champions League?

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola says Real Madrid have become 'like a derby' fixture after giants are drawn to face each other once again in the Champions League
arts.sum: Manchester City felt deja vu on Friday after being paired with Real Madrid in the Champions League as Pep Guardiola claimed the grudge match is now a Clasico.

arts.ttl: Preview, Squad List, Team News: Real Madrid vs. Espanyol; Liga F 2024/25
arts.sum: As a newly promoted team, they’ve accumulated 4 wins, 6 draws, and 6 losses so far in this season’s Liga F campaign. Real Madrid will face Espanyol on matchday 17 of Liga F.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid v Atletico Madrid: How and Where to Buy Tickets
arts.sum: There cannot be too many better seasons in which to secure a ticket to the Madrid derby....

arts.ttl: €300m to Real Madrid & €140m to the player – Saudi club’s massive January offer revealed
arts.sum: An insight into the financial terms of a proposal received by La Liga giants Real Madrid for Rodrygo this month has today been provided. The info comes courtesy of El…

arts.ttl: The epic Champions League rivalry between Real Madrid and Man City
arts.sum: City went into the final round of games in the 36-team league phase needing to win just to secure the lifeline of a playoff . The Champions League’s most engrossing rivalry in recent years will resume in a two-legged playoff next month to reach the round of 16.

arts.ttl: Watch: New Barcelona signing arrives for medical after Real Madrid beaten to deal

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola ready for Real Madrid ‘derby’ after Champions League draw
arts.sum: The two sides will meet for the fifth time in six seasons, while Celtic take on Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Three in, three out: Real Madrid publish their squad to face Espanyol this weekend as key player returns
arts.sum: Games keep coming thick and fast for Carlo Ancelotti and his Real Madrid players, as Los Blancos are set to travel to Barcelona to face Espanyol on Saturday evening. Ancelotti…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “There are many who would like to be in Rodrygo’s place at Real Madrid”
arts.sum: Now, I don’t like to give names, but there are a lot of players who want to come here. He was asked about Rodrygo’s links to Saudi Arabia as of late, to which he said: “I find it difficult to talk about the future of the players, because they are personal decisions.
